case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. vs. LEDAY, CARLTON JR. et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEDAY, CARLTON JR. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 216 EDDY ST #422, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION ON ORIGINAL LEASE RENDERED PER CRC 522
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $5.96 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT LEDAY, CARLTON JR. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT LEDAY, CARLTON JR.
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. SERVED FEB-03-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEDAY, CARLTON JR.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEDAY, CARLTON JR.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LEDAY, CARLTON JR.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT AND/OR NOTICE TO VACATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.
